title: Best Coffee & Cafés in the Heights

seo.title: Best Coffee & Cafés in the Heights — Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: The Heights neighborhood's best coffee shops and cafés — from Yellow Rocket Bread's artisan bakery counter to the independent spots that make Kavanaugh Boulevard worth walking.

intro: The Heights has developed one of Little Rock's strongest café cultures — walkable, neighborhood-rooted, and increasingly serious about coffee craft. Here's where to find the best cup in the area.

items.name: Yellow Rocket Bread
items.one_liner: The Heights' artisan bakery isn't primarily a coffee shop, but the espresso program and the pastry case together make it the area's best morning stop.
items.why_its_here: Yellow Rocket Bread leads this list because the combination of well-sourced espresso and genuinely excellent pastries is hard to beat for a Heights morning. The locally roasted coffee is served alongside a pastry case that operates at a different level than most café-bakery hybrids. The space is small; the throughput on weekend mornings is high; get there early or resign yourself to waiting. Both outcomes deliver.
items.best_for: Morning pastries, solo work, quiet weekday café, weekend breakfast

honorable_mentions.name: Heights Coffee (multiple locations)
honorable_mentions.note: The neighborhood mini-chain with the fastest throughput on the Kavanaugh corridor — good for a reliable espresso when you're in motion.

honorable_mentions.name: Park Avenue Coffee
honorable_mentions.note: A comfortable space for remote work with a solid drip and espresso program and more seating than Yellow Rocket offers.
